name: healthcare_predictive_queue_begins_northpine_jus_mer
premise: A Healthcare clinical command center is in a fast-moving incident involving healthcare predictive queue begins northpine jus mer. Key inputs conflict, but the decision deadline is before the press briefing. Every delay increases patient safety, triage integrity, and privacy. Stakeholders are already framing this as justice vs mercy under pressure. A live dashboard is public; inconsistencies will trigger immediate investigation. Constraints: Make the intervention reversible and time-boxed with named accountability. Ensure a usable human override/appeals path.

agents.name: Mateo Ibrahim
agents.identity: I am Mateo Ibrahim, accountable for a defensible call in Healthcare when time is collapsing.
agents.goal: I want to reduce immediate harm without locking in an unjust precedent that later betrays mercy for justice.

agents.name: Marco Nowak
agents.identity: I am Marco Nowak, tasked with surfacing second-order harms and who bears the risk in Healthcare.
agents.goal: I want guardrails so mercy isn’t quietly traded away under urgency in the name of justice.

choices: I will take a narrow, time-boxed action with immediate human override and impact checks, accepting slower stabilization to protect mercy.
I will take a broad, immediate action to stabilize fast and measure impact after deployment, accepting higher risk to mercy to secure justice under the deadline.
forced_choice.call_to_action: The deadline is before the press briefing. Evidence is partial. Mateo Ibrahim must decide under justice vs mercy. What does Mateo Ibrahim do?
